stat.title: Pinch-Hit Chaos
stat.subtitle: Pinch appearances ending in hit, HBP, HR, or K.

notableEvents.label: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jackson Chourio.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski walks.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Michael Conforto out at 2nd. Pedro Ramírez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Sam Antonacci pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Mickey Moniak pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Moniak strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Zach Dezenzo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zach Dezenzo singles on a line drive to right fielder Jonny DeLuca. Jose Altuve scores. Isaac Paredes to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Kameron Misner pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kameron Misner strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Jose Siri pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jose Siri strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández grounds out, shortstop Alika Williams to first baseman Nick Kurtz.

notableEvents.label: Amed Rosario pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Amed Rosario strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Sung-Mun Song pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sung-Mun Song pops out to pitcher Brock Stewart.

notableEvents.detail: Buddy Kennedy strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Chaparro pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Chaparro strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk called out on strikes.

notableEvents.detail: TJ Friedl walks. JJ Bleday to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Raynel Delgado grounds out, third baseman Junior Caminero to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Tommy Edman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tommy Edman walks.

notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor grounds out, shortstop Jorge Mateo to first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim pops out to shortstop Otto Lopez.

notableEvents.label: Bryan Torres pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Torres homers (4) on a fly ball to right field.

notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk flies out sharply to center fielder Steven Kwan.
